summary: M369 — Combat Report damage attribution: legendary effects (Dragon Breath, Arcane Bounce, Mana Shockwave, Echo Cast) now record their damage with the effect's name + element instead of bucketing under 'Attack'. _dispatchLegendaryHook ctx.applyDmg now accepts (sourceName, element) optional args; legendary effects pass them so the meter shows 'Dragon Breath / fire' as a separate row.
